name: The Gauntlet — Rules Test Hub
author: Lantern & Blade Project
description: A Warden's training hall under the Hollowmarch: nine small chambers in a central foyer, each purpose-built to exercise one mechanical surface of the Lantern & Blade rules engine. Intended for rapid regression testing during rules-engine development, not as a narrative playthrough. Reuses the Lantern & Blade rules, setting, bestiary, and items library; adds a bespoke module and a Fighter pregen (Aldric).
